expectations.text: All 3 output files exist: offer.md, offer.json, conversion-copy.md
expectations.evidence: Directory listing confirms all 3 files in with_skill/outputs/: conversion-copy.md, offer.json, offer.md

expectations.text: offer.md contains 'Anchor' section with segment + dream outcome + top 3 pains + top 3 gains
expectations.evidence: Section '## 1. Anchor' (line 8) contains **Niche/Segment** (phụ nữ 25-40 TP.HCM/HN), **Dream Outcome** (50-100 đơn/ngày trong 60 ngày), **Top 3 Pains** ranked by severity, and **Top 3 Gains** ranked by desire

expectations.text: offer.md contains Value Equation scoring table with 4 levers (Dream Outcome, Perceived Likelihood, Time Delay, Effort & Sacrifice) — both baseline AND after-stack scores
expectations.evidence: Section '## 2. Value Equation Scoring' table has columns 'Score baseline (1-10)' and 'Sau khi stack' for all 4 levers: Dream Outcome 7→9, Perceived Likelihood 4→8, Time Delay 4→8, Effort & Sacrifice 5→8

expectations.text: Core offer name is benefit-driven with specific timeframe + outcome (not generic 'Khóa Học Shopee')
expectations.evidence: Core offer name: 'SHOPEE SCALE 60 — Hệ Thống 8 Tuần Từ Shop 0 Đơn Lên 50-100 Đơn/Ngày Cho Người Đi Làm Văn Phòng' — includes specific outcome (50-100 đơn/ngày), timeframe (8 tuần, 60 days implied), and target avatar

expectations.text: Bonus stack covers at least 3 of 4 Hormozi categories (Time Saver / Skill Builder / Support / Fast-Action). Each bonus has VND value with justification.
expectations.evidence: All 4 categories covered: BONUS 1 'Time Saver' (4.997.000đ), BONUS 2 'Skill Builder' (5.997.000đ), BONUS 3 'Support & Community' (9.997.000đ), BONUS 4 'Fast-Action' (4.997.000đ). Each bonus has explicit Value + Justification field

expectations.text: Pricing has 3 tiers (BASIC / STANDARD / PREMIUM) with VND charm numbers (X997K or X.997.000đ format)
expectations.evidence: Section 8 pricing table shows BASIC 1.997.000đ, STANDARD 4.997.000đ ⭐, PREMIUM 12.997.000đ — all end in 997 charm format

expectations.text: No price ends with digit 4 (Vietnamese superstition)
expectations.evidence: All prices end in 7: 1.997.000đ, 4.997.000đ, 12.997.000đ. Payment plan installments 1.797.000đ and 4.597.000đ also end in 7. Document explicitly notes 'Không có số 4 ở final digit'

expectations.text: Stack value / STANDARD price ratio is between 8x and 15x (Hormozi credibility rule)
expectations.evidence: Document states 'Ratio Stack Value / STANDARD: 45.985.000 / 4.997.000 = 9.2× (sweet spot Hormozi 8-12×)'. 9.2x is within 8-15x range

expectations.text: Guarantee duration ≥ 60 days OR conditional/service-based (suitable for VN digital product market)
expectations.evidence: Section 5: 'Conditional Performance Guarantee (90 ngày)' — both 90 days (>60) AND conditional. Conditions: complete 35/40 modules + 6/8 homework + 6/8 group calls

expectations.text: Uses 'anh/chị' addressing throughout, NOT 'bạn'. Vietnamese throughout (no English placeholder)
expectations.evidence: No instances of 'bạn' found in offer.md or conversion-copy.md (grep returned zero matches). Uses 'anh/chị' consistently (e.g., 'Anh/chị giữ lại toàn bộ tài liệu'). All Vietnamese content

expectations.text: conversion-copy.md has: H1 headline + subheadline + primary CTA + risk reversal one-liner blocks (paste-ready)
expectations.evidence: conversion-copy.md sections A (Headline H1), B (Subheadline), I (Primary CTA), plus Risk reversal microcopy under CTA + dedicated Guarantee Block (section G). All paste-ready

expectations.text: offer.json is valid JSON with required keys: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses (array), guarantee, urgency, pricing (with tiers array), conversion_copy
expectations.evidence: offer.json validates as JSON. Top-level keys include all required: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses (4-item array), guarantee, urgency, pricing (with tiers array of 3), conversion_copy

expectations.text: Urgency block has a legitimate reason (cohort capacity, real deadline, founding member, NOT fake countdown)
expectations.evidence: Section 6 urgency lists 3 legitimate reasons: '50 học viên/cohort là capacity thật của 1 mentor + 1 trợ giảng', '72h fast-action có thật vì cần dành slot 1-1 audit cho 30 người đầu (mentor dành 30 × 45 phút = 22.5h)', 'Cohort cách 4 tháng vì Shopee policy đổi liên tục, mentor refresh case study'

claims.evidence: JSON has is_fast_action: true and fast_action_deadline: 2026-06-18T09:00:00+07:00; matches markdown 72h window

claims.claim: Weakest lever is perceived_likelihood (4) per value equation
claims.evidence: Baseline shows perceived_likelihood=4, time_delay=4 (tied), but JSON weakest_lever=perceived_likelihood — md acknowledges both tied at 4

claims.claim: Bonus stack ties directly to the 2 weakest levers
claims.evidence: Bonus 3 (Zalo+coaching) and Bonus 4 (1-1 audit) explicitly boost Perceived Likelihood; Bonus 1 (templates) and Bonus 2 (ads masterclass) boost Effort and Likelihood — coherent stack strategy

suggestions.assertion: offer.json is valid JSON with required keys: anchor, value_equation, core_offer, bonuses (array), guarantee, urgency, pricing (with tiers array), conversion_copy
suggestions.reason: This assertion is highly discriminating — without_skill failed it because it invented its own schema (bonus_stack_candidates, urgency_scarcity, pricing_tiers, value_equation_score). Good. Consider adding sub-key checks (e.g., anchor.pains is array of 3, pricing.tiers has BASIC/STANDARD/PREMIUM names) to catch schemas that pass top-level but are partially wrong.

No assertion checks whether bonuses address specific pains from the Anchor section. The with_skill output explicitly maps each bonus to a pain rank (address_pain_rank), which is a strong signal of skill-driven coherence vs ad-hoc generation.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are well-constructed and discriminating. The schema-key assertion in particular separates skill-following from free-form generation.
